opportunities.title: Approved in-product Spectrum walkthrough
opportunities.outcome: A sanctioned demo that shows the native bankruptcy workflow inside Spectrum without switching tools.
opportunities.why: Directly resolves the switching objection Film 1 is built to answer, using proof existing Spectrum users trust.
opportunities.recommendation: Lock live/showable functions and cleaned Spectrum assets, then produce a short role-specific walkthrough.
opportunities.source: BankruptcyWatch factual canon — Shaw Systems & BankruptcyWatch Dynamic; Film1 Working Memory

opportunities.title: Exception triage copilot for monitoring
opportunities.outcome: Human-reviewed AI assist that prioritizes filings the current rules-based pipeline flags as exceptions.
opportunities.why: Monitoring is confirmed as rules-based today; targeted AI reduces manual review effort without replacing controls.
opportunities.recommendation: Run a bounded pilot on a sample exception queue with clear human validation and success criteria.
opportunities.source: BankruptcyWatch factual canon — Comprehensive Bankruptcy Monitoring and AI Use Audit

opportunities.title: Role-specific integration one-pager
opportunities.outcome: Concise enablement piece tailored to servicing, compliance, and recovery leaders evaluating the integration.
opportunities.why: Supports acquisition and retention conversations once claim/asset language is approved for publication.
opportunities.recommendation: Draft after Film 1 claim lock so wording matches approved public language.
opportunities.source: BankruptcyWatch factual canon — Shaw Systems & BankruptcyWatch Dynamic
